resources.string: Auto-fix failed, please check code manually
Calling AI model to generate module code...
Request timeout, please check network and retry
Automatically fix detected errors in code.
Generate JavaScript/CSS code based on requirement description.
Get code templates related to requirements.
Check code style and best practices, provide optimization suggestions.
Preview module effect on specified page.
Refactor and optimize code, improve readability and performance.
Scan code for security issues like XSS, unsafe eval usage, etc.
Check JavaScript or CSS code for syntax errors. Returns error list and fix suggestions.
Run module code on test page, return execution results.
Validate completeness and correctness of module configuration items.
Describe the feature you want in natural language AI will automatically generate extension module code
AI generated code is automatically saved here
AI generated code will be saved here
AI-assisted HTML/CSS/JS code generation and modification
AI helps you quickly generate app code
Please configure an API Key in AI settings first
Cannot find API Key for the model
Please add and save a model in AI settings first
AI helps you quickly generate beautiful webpages
AI HTML coding: AI-assisted code generation
AI icon generation: AI generates app icons
AI module developer agent: natural language module generation
Create a React todo app with add, delete, mark complete and local storage support
Build a Vue.js e-commerce product listing page with filtering, sorting and cart
Create a Gin framework RESTful API with route groups, middleware and database operations
Build a Go microservice with gRPC endpoints and HTTP gateway
Create a modern personal homepage with navbar, hero section, portfolio and contact info
Build a weather forecast app UI with city search, current weather and 7-day forecast
Create an Express REST API with user registration, login, JWT auth and CRUD endpoints
Build a WebSocket real-time chat server with multi-room support and message broadcasting
Create a Laravel blog system with post management, categories, tags and comments
Build a PHP user management system with registration, login and role-based access control
Build a FastAPI RESTful service with database models, auto-docs and auth middleware
Create a Flask web app with file upload, image processing and download functionality
Develop a WordPress custom theme with homepage template, post listing and sidebar widgets
Create a WordPress plugin that adds custom post types and an admin settings page
AI settings: unified API key and model management
Checkpoints are created automatically after each conversation
Code modified, the modified version will be used when saving
Configure model capability tags for different scenarios
Continue development based on this code:
⚠️ After editing, conversations after this message will be deleted
Coat of arms,Quill pen,Wax seal,Gothic font
Auto scroll page for reading long articles
Block ad popups and banners on web pages
Add dark mode to web pages
Remove copy restrictions on web pages
Add playback speed control for videos
Rounded elements, soft shadows, cute icons, candy colors
Neon colors, glow effects, glitch art, grid lines, tech-style fonts
Dark backgrounds, light text, soft glow effects, high contrast
backdrop-filter: blur(), translucent backgrounds, gradients, soft borders
Colorful gradients, fluid feel, dynamic backgrounds, rounded shapes
Black and white palette, generous whitespace, clear typography, no decoration
Generous whitespace, clean layout, soft shadows, rounded elements
Green palette, natural elements, rounded shapes, soft shadows
Glowing text, neon borders, dark backgrounds, high contrast
Dual shadows (light/dark), soft background, rounded corners, raised or inset effects
☢️ Device may freeze completely requiring reboot. PackageManager may crash. For security research only.
🔴 Launcher severely lagging, device unresponsive, may trigger ANR
🟠 Home screen nearly covered with icons, Launcher shows noticeable delay
💚 Multiple icons visible on home screen, slight impact
🟡 Noticeable icon flood on home screen, Launcher may briefly lag
✅ No impact on device, normal usage
Leave empty to use app name, or enter prefix for: Prefix 1, Prefix 2...
🔓 No limit — inject unlimited desktop icons via native activity-alias
Each icon uses a different random name for obfuscation

Icon Storm leverages Android\'s native activity-alias mechanism. Each alias has its own MAIN/LAUNCHER intent-filter, forcing the Launcher to create an independent icon. This is by-design Android framework behavior, not an exploit. At extreme counts, the Launcher\'s processing capacity becomes the bottleneck.

⚠️ High icon counts may cause severe Launcher lag or device freeze on the target device. This feature is for security research and Launcher stress testing only. Please understand the risks before building the APK.
Describe the feature you want, e.g.: Block ad popups on web pages...
2. Model does not support current request
No API keys yet, click top right to add
No saved models yet, click top right to add
No saved versions Checkpoints are created automatically during conversation, or save manually
Preview not supported for this app type
Israeli AI company. Jamba series based on SSM-Transformer hybrid, excels at long context processing
Claude models, excels at text understanding and code generation with vision support, strong programming ability.
Chinese LLM, excels at Chinese language understanding and generation, supports search augmentation
Wafer-scale chip inference, extremely fast. Supports ultra-fast inference for Llama and other open-source models
Free tier available, pay per usage
Enterprise AI platform. Command R+ series excels at RAG and enterprise search, supports 100+ languages
Custom service compatible with OpenAI API format. Requires full Base URL
Open-source model inference platform, supports hundreds of models. OpenAI-compatible API, affordable pricing
Chinese national team, cost-effective. Currently supports text and image-text generation only
High-performance inference platform with multiple open-source models. Focuses on low-latency inference optimization
Chinese, GLM-4.6 series performs well, strong coding ability, supports multimodal
★Recommended★ Gemini 3.0 Pro excels at frontend, native multimodal support, fully featured.
Free tier available, pay per token after limit
Elon Musk\'s xAI Grok series, supports text and vision
Ultra-fast inference engine powered by LPU hardware. Extremely fast response, ideal for real-time chat
Tencent\'s LLM, excels at Chinese dialogue and code generation, supports multimodal
Desktop local model runner with OpenAI-compatible API. GUI-based model management
Chinese, supports high-quality voice cloning/synthesis. Excellent text model, strong code agent capability
Leading European AI company. Mistral Large series with strong reasoning, multilingual and code generation support
Mistral Large ~\\$2/M tokens, free models available
Chinese LLM, Kimi series excels at long text processing (200K+ context), strong coding ability
AI model inference platform, supports LLM and image generation models. OpenAI-compatible API
Run open-source models locally, completely free. Install Ollama on PC and ensure mobile access
Excellent text performance, strong reasoning, supports text, vision and image generation
Aggregates multiple AI providers with unified API. Use one API Key to access OpenAI, Claude, Gemini and more
Pay per model, transparent pricing, free models available, highly recommended
AI search engine. Sonar series models with built-in web search, ideal for real-time information needs
Alibaba Cloud Tongyi Qwen, supports text, vision, audio multimodal. Qwen3 series has strong reasoning
AI chip company providing high-speed inference. Supports Llama, DeepSeek and other open-source models
Chinese AI platform, aggregates various open source models.
iFlytek\'s LLM, strong speech recognition and Chinese understanding, OpenAI-compatible API
Free tier available, pay per usage
Chinese LLM, Step series supports ultra-long context (256K), strong multimodal capability
Free tier available, pay per usage
Open-source model aggregator, supports hundreds of models. OpenAI-compatible API with fine-tuning support
Pay per model, low prices for open-source models
High-performance LLM inference engine with OpenAI-compatible API. Suitable for self-hosted production
ByteDance\'s AI platform, balanced Doubao model ecosystem. Recommended: doubao-1.6-pro-256k
Founded by Kai-Fu Lee. Yi series models balanced in Chinese-English, supports long context
Request timed out, please check network connection and retry
Rollback to previous conversation state and restore code library
Rolled back to: %s Last message filled in input, click send to regenerate
Auto-load and run, no UI, non-interactive
Simple UI in management panel, or launch independent window for full UI
Select feature scenes for this capability
Select a style template, AI will generate code based on this style
Stream response did not complete normally
Suggestion: Try changing model or check API settings
Unified control of all audio on the page
Display console logs on the page
Collect all images on the page
Collect all links on the page
Add speed control, picture-in-picture, etc. for videos
Check code style and best practices
Create or overwrite a file. Supports all React/Vue/Next.js project file types (JSX/TSX/CSS/JSON, etc.).
Create or overwrite a file. Supports Go project files (.go/go.mod/HTML templates, etc.).
Create or overwrite a file. Write complete code to the specified file. Supports HTML/CSS/JS/JSON/SVG file types.
Create or overwrite a file. Supports Node.js project files (JS/TS/JSON/package.json, etc.).
Create or overwrite a file. Supports PHP project files (PHP/HTML/CSS/JS, etc.).
Create or overwrite a file. Supports Python project files (.py/requirements.txt/HTML templates, etc.).
Create or overwrite a file. Supports WordPress theme/plugin files (PHP/CSS/JS, etc.).
